examples: She sent 100 white marigold seeds along with the letter.
She planted some common marigold seeds and took care of them.
A company in the United States once decided that it would offer lots of money to anyone who could find a white marigold.
Kerry Washington was a stunner in a marigold lace and fringed number from Stella McCartney.
They were The Best Exotic Marigold Hotel, Anna Karenina, Les Miserables, and Seven Psychopaths.
